message.name: ENGAGEMENT_STATUS
message.description: Engagement guidance status. Carries the estimated time-to-impact used by the ground station to display an abort countdown during a terminal engagement run.
message.field: Engagement state: 0=INACTIVE, 1=DIVE, 2=RECOVER.
Estimated time until impact. NaN if not estimable.
Slant range from the vehicle to the target. NaN if unknown.
Closing speed along the line of sight, positive when closing. NaN if unknown.
1 if time_to_impact is a usable estimate, 0 otherwise.

message.name: VISION_ENGAGEMENT_STATUS
message.description: Vision-aided engagement guidance status. Line-of-sight regulation state and the range/time-to-impact estimates used by the ground station during a camera-guided terminal run.
message.field: Guidance state: 0=SEARCH, 1=TRACK, 2=COAST, 3=TERMINAL, 4=ABORT.
Azimuth line-of-sight error from boresight, positive right.
Elevation line-of-sight error from boresight, positive below.
Slant range estimate to the target. NaN if unknown.
Closing speed along the line of sight, positive when closing. NaN if unknown.
Estimated time until impact. NaN if not estimable.
1 if time_to_impact is a usable estimate, 0 otherwise.
Track confidence 0..255 (255 = 1.0). 0 when no lock.

message.name: NEXAM_TARGET_SELECT
message.description: Operator visual target designation from the ground station to the companion tracker. Sent once when the operator selects (click or drag) a target on the live video.
message.field: Selection box top-left X, normalized 0..1 (0 = left edge).
Selection box top-left Y, normalized 0..1 (0 = top edge).
Selection box bottom-right X, normalized 0..1.
Selection box bottom-right Y, normalized 0..1.
System id that should run the tracker (companion computer).
Component id that should run the tracker (companion tracker).
Selection action: 0=CANCEL (stop tracking), 1=SELECT (start tracking).
Monotonic selection id, incremented on each new designation.

message.name: NEXAM_TARGET_TRACK
message.description: Tracked target state streamed from the companion tracker to the ground station, once per processed frame, so the operator sees the live tracked box on the video.
message.field: Tracked box top-left X, normalized 0..1.
Tracked box top-left Y, normalized 0..1.
Tracked box bottom-right X, normalized 0..1.
Tracked box bottom-right Y, normalized 0..1.
Track confidence 0..1. NaN if not provided by the tracker.
Tracker status: 0=IDLE, 1=TRACKING, 2=LOST.
Selection id this track corresponds to.
